name: No witnesses to my back tweak at work in Boise, still claimable?
description: Yes, doctor records and your account enough.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my back tweak at work in Boise, still claimable?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, doctor records and your account enough.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, medical records and your testimony suffice if credible.**

Idaho doesn't require witnesses; consistent history key.[2]

- Supervisor acknowledgment.
- Contemporaneous notes.
- Video if available.

Attorney builds case; common for strains.[2]
